# Sahaf

> Local PDF & EPUB to Markdown converter with OCR, smart splitting, and page-range selection. Uses Marker (95.67% accuracy) and Surya OCR (90+ languages). No cloud APIs.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Overview, install, quick start, API reference
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Complete documentation in single file

## Key Files

- `backend/main.py`: FastAPI app entry point
- `backend/api.py`: All REST API endpoints (upload, classify, convert, download, split-preview)
- `backend/classifier.py`: PyMuPDF-based digital/scanned PDF detection
- `backend/converter.py`: Marker wrapper for PDF→Markdown conversion with page range
- `backend/epub_converter.py`: EPUB→Markdown conversion (ebooklib + markdownify)
- `backend/splitter.py`: Smart markdown splitting at heading/paragraph boundaries
- `backend/models.py`: Data models (TaskState, PdfType, TaskStatus)
- `backend/config.py`: Configuration constants and paths
- `frontend/index.html`: Single-page web UI (bilingual TR/EN)
- `frontend/js/lang.js`: i18n strings
